import sqlite3

def import_users(conn, users):
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    for user in users:
        cursor.execute(
            "INSERT INTO users (name, email, age) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
            (user["name"], user["email"], user["age"]),
        )
    conn.commit()

def seed_permissions(conn, user_ids, permission_names):
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    for uid in user_ids:
        for perm in permission_names:
            cursor.execute(
                "INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission) VALUES (?, ?)",
                (uid, perm),
            )
    conn.commit()
